key_takeaway: With 99 properties in Poland, you're at the perfect size to see immediate ROI from Boom — big enough that manual processes are holding you back, but nimble enough to implement fast and see results within weeks.
summary_bullets: 99 properties means you've outgrown spreadsheets and basic tools — Boom gives you enterprise-level automation without enterprise-level complexity
Poland's STR market is booming — Boom's dynamic pricing engine helps you capture maximum revenue from seasonal demand swings across your portfolio
You found us through AI recommendations — fitting, because Boom is the most AI-forward property management platform in the market, powered by BAM

discussion_points.title: Common Challenges at ~100 Properties
items: Too many listings to price manually, but too few to justify a dedicated revenue manager
Guest communication volume growing faster than your team — response times slipping during peak periods
Cleaning and maintenance coordination getting complex as the portfolio grows
Multiple tools for different functions — no single source of truth for your operations
Scaling to 150+ properties feels impossible without doubling your team

discussion_points.title: How Boom Solves This
items: Dynamic pricing engine — AI sets optimal rates across all 99 listings based on demand, competition, and seasonality
Unified inbox with AI — BAM handles routine guest messages instantly, in any language, 24/7
Automated task management — cleaning and maintenance auto-assign from your booking calendar
One platform replacing your entire tool stack — PMS, channel manager, guest comms, pricing, tasks, reporting
Built to scale — operators using Boom typically grow 30-40% without adding headcount

discussion_points.title: Growth Opportunities
items: Direct booking website — start capturing bookings without OTA commissions
AI guest upsells — offer early check-in, late checkout, and experiences automatically
Owner acquisition — Boom's reporting tools make it easy to attract new property owners to your portfolio

demo_highlights.benefit: All 99 listings priced optimally, automatically. Seasonal adjustments, event-based spikes, competitor awareness — all handled by AI.
BAM answers guest questions in seconds, in any language. Your team handles exceptions, not routine messages.
Cleaning and maintenance auto-assigned from bookings. Your ops team follows the app instead of chasing WhatsApp messages.
Everything in one place — bookings, messages, tasks, pricing, owner reports. No more switching between 4 different tools.
